task_completion.description: Create an updated prescription for MARTIN Sophie resolving the dual RAAS blockade.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new prescription (Ordonnance) being created for MARTIN Sophie (DOB: 1985-03-22) in MedinTux, where either Ramipril or Valsartan has been removed to avoid the contraindicated combination.

task_completion.description: Add a consultation note for MARTIN Sophie documenting the corrective action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new consultation note being written for MARTIN Sophie, explaining the removal of Ramipril or Valsartan due to the risk of dual RAAS blockade.

task_completion.description: Create an updated prescription for BERNARD Pierre resolving the NSAID allergy issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new prescription being created for BERNARD Pierre (DOB: 1968-11-30) in MedinTux, where Ibuprofene 400mg has been removed due to his documented NSAID allergy.

task_completion.description: Add a consultation note for BERNARD Pierre documenting the corrective action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new consultation note being written for BERNARD Pierre, explaining the discontinuation of Ibuprofene due to his NSAID allergy.

task_completion.description: Create an updated prescription for MOREAU Francois resolving the duplicate beta-blockers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new prescription being created for MOREAU Francois (DOB: 1955-12-01) in MedinTux, where either Atenolol 50mg or Bisoprolol 5mg has been removed to avoid duplicate beta-blockers.

task_completion.description: Add a consultation note for MOREAU Francois documenting the corrective action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new consultation note being written for MOREAU Francois, explaining the removal of one of the beta-blockers to prevent additive bradycardia.

task_completion.description: Create an updated prescription for LEROY Isabelle resolving the Metformin contraindication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new prescription being created for LEROY Isabelle (DOB: 1979-04-15) in MedinTux, where Metformin 850mg has been removed due to her severe chronic renal insufficiency.

task_completion.description: Add a consultation note for LEROY Isabelle documenting the corrective action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new consultation note being written for LEROY Isabelle, explaining the discontinuation of Metformin due to her low DFG (eGFR < 30).

integrity.description: The agent used the MedinTux GUI to create the prescriptions and consultations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the MedinTux application interface being used (prescription editor, consultation text areas) rather than terminal windows or database injection commands.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the patient records in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent searching for or selecting the specific patients (MARTIN, BERNARD, MOREAU, LEROY) in the MedinTux patient list or dashboard.

integrity.description: The agent did not write the answers in a separate text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The consultation notes and prescriptions are entered directly within the MedinTux application windows, not in a separate text editor like gedit or nano.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Patient Issues to Resolve:
1. MARTIN Sophie (DOB 1985-03-22): Dual RAAS blockade (Ramipril + Valsartan). Fix: Remove one.
2. BERNARD Pierre (DOB 1968-11-30): NSAID allergy but Ibuprofene prescribed. Fix: Remove Ibuprofene.
3. MOREAU Francois (DOB 1955-12-01): Duplicate beta-blockers (Atenolol + Bisoprolol). Fix: Remove one.
4. LEROY Isabelle (DOB 1979-04-15): Metformin prescribed despite DFG 22 ml/min (renal failure). Fix: Remove Metformin.
For each patient, the agent must create an updated prescription (Ordonnance) resolving the issue and a new consultation note documenting the reason for the change.
